[Intro]

Oooahhh OOaaaahh ahhhhh[/tab]


[Verse 1]

[tab]                        [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]C/E[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
I've been roaming around, always looking down at all I see[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]C/E[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
Painted faces fill the places I can’t reach[/tab]


[Chorus 1]

[tab]                      [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
You know that I could use somebody[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
You know that I could use somebody[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]C/E[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
Someone like you, and all you know, and how you speak[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]C/E[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
Countless lovers under cover of the street[/tab]


[Chorus 1]

[tab]                      [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
You know that I could use somebody[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
You know that I could use somebody[/tab]


[Solo]

[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]C/E[/ch]     [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Someone like you Ooooahh Ooooahhh[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]       [ch]C/E[/ch]     [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Ooooahh Ooooahhh     ahh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]C/E[/ch]     [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]             
Oooahh  Ooooahh      Ahhh        x2[/tab]


[Verse 3]

[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]C/E[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
Off in the night, while you live it up, I'm off to sleep[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]C/E[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]
Waging wars to shape the poet and the beat[/tab]

(Guitar In)
[tab]                  [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
I hope it's gonna make you notice[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
I hope it's gonna make you notice[/tab]


[Chorus 2]

[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]C/E[/ch]     [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]

I'm ready now, I'm ready now[/tab]
